name: Tokkosho of Ghost Destroying
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>独</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鈷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>杵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When the equipped monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can select up to 2 monsters in your opponent's Graveyard, and remove them from play.
eff: When the equipped monster inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can select up to 2 monsters in your opponent's Graveyard, and remove them from play.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
